_comment: Copy this file to firm_config.json and fill in your firm's details. Remove all _comment fields before running.
_comment_docs: Google Doc IDs for each output destination. Create blank Docs, open them, copy the ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit).
_comment_research: Research sender domains → Google Doc IDs. Emails from these domains are auto-classified as RESEARCH without LLM triage. Map each domain to the Doc where their content should be appended.
_comment_keywords: Keywords that trigger DEAL classification during email triage. Include active deal names, key counterparties, and transaction terms. Lowercase.
_comment_recruit: Keywords that trigger RECRUITING classification. Include search firm names, recruiter firms, and role-related terms.
_comment_keychain: Keychain service prefix for all stored secrets. All team members at the same firm use the same prefix (they each store the same key in their own Keychain). A second firm on its own machines should change this to something unique (e.g. 'stonepeak-pipeline'). This determines which Anthropic account is billed — one prefix = one Anthropic account.
_comment_packages: Active pipeline packages. Remove a package to disable its pipelines and show empty states in the dashboard for its tiles. Options: 'market_intelligence' (research/briefing/deal-ideas), 'operations' (email/calls/transcripts/actions).
_comment_podcast_feeds: Package A only. Map of show name → RSS URL. The pipeline transcribes every new episode from these feeds and writes summaries to per-show Google Docs. Add or remove shows freely.
_comment_podcast_folder: Google Drive folder ID where per-show summary Docs live. The pipeline auto-creates one Doc per show inside this folder.
_comment_claude_projects: Subscription-mode only (firm_context.yaml :: auth_mode=subscription). One Claude.ai Project ID per package — set during install (./setup.sh --auth-mode=subscription walks you through provisioning four projects). Empty/missing dict is fine for api-mode tenants and for subscription-mode v1 (preamble inlined per call). Per-package model assignments (Sonnet for briefing/capture/research, Opus for deals) are defined in the project itself, not here.
